instruction:
Define a macro that eliminates this repetitive pattern:
(next-ffi)

Issue: Macro call that should be transformed by next-ffi
reference_defmacro:
(defmacro next-ffi ()
  (with-gensyms (next)
    `(let ((,next (cadr fields)))
       (foreign-to-ffi
        (and ,next (foreign-type ,next))
        (cdr names)
        (cdr params)
        (cdr fields)
        body))))
